title: February 14
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 14''' is the 45th day of the year. There are 320 days remaining, 321 in leap years.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Toby Philpott]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[James Eckhouse]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Simon Pegg]] is born.
*1970 – [[Cary Porter]] is born.
*[[1983]] – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|The Empire Strikes Back:]]'' "[[Freedom's Winter]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1984]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 83|''Star Wars'' (1977) 83]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 7|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 7]] published.
*1995 – [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 5]] published.
*[[1998]] – [[Roy Beck]] dies.
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars Insider 66|''Star Wars Insider'' 66]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Legacy (2006) 8|''Legacy'' (2006) 8]] published.
*2007 – ''[[Star Wars: Rebellion Volume 1: My Brother, My Enemy]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Drewe Henley]] dies.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars: OBI-123|''Star Wars: Obi-1, 2 3: A Book of Numbers'']] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Darth Vader (2017) 11|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 11]] published.
*2018 – [[Poe Dameron 24|''Poe Dameron'' 24]] published.
*2018 – [[Thrawn 1|''Thrawn'' 1]] published.
*[[2022]] – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Mandalorian Armor]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2023]] – [[The High Republic: The Battle of Jedha (script)|''The High Republic: The Battle of Jedha'' script]] published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunters Vol. 5 — The Raid on the Vermillion]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – Episodes 20 - 25 of ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures]]'' premiered on [[Disney+]].
*2024 – "[[Aftershock / Feather Frenzy]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*2024 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 43|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 43]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 3|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 3]] published.
